brand.name: Level up Lady
brand.tagline: A Women's Empowerment School Dedicated To Helping You Unlock Your Full Potential And Attract Success!

offer.what: Women's empowerment blog (100+ articles), free self-improvement eBooks/courses, and life coaching by certified coach Brittany Cherrell; hosted on Teachable school. Primary domain (theleveluplady.com) appears to be in transition/rebuild; active school at level-up-lady-school.teachable.com.
offer.coreOutcome: Women unlock their full potential, build confidence, and attract the life they want — with practical inner-work tools that don't cost a fortune.
offer.pricePoint: Free tier dominant (free ebook, free blog). Budget-conscious paid courses implied but not currently listed. 1:1 coaching likely available by inquiry; price unknown.
offer.commitment: Self-paced, no long-term contract implied; ad-hoc or course-by-course
leadMagnets: 30 Days of Quotes to Live by and WHY eBook + Workbook (free, via Teachable)

audience.icp: Women of all ages and life stages who feel stuck, under-confident, or not living up to their potential — especially budget-conscious women who want personal development without expensive coaching fees.
painPoints: Living a life that's hard to get up to in the morning
Feeling stuck or not reaching full potential
Need inner-work support but don't know where to start
segments: Early-stage personal development seekers (brand new to self-improvement)
Women in transition (career, relationship, life stage shifts)
Budget-conscious learners who consume free/low-cost content
Women entrepreneurs / ambitious women (based on Women Helping Women Entrepreneurs directory listing)

salesCycle.length: Unknown; likely days-to-weeks for low-ticket digital products; potentially months for 1:1 coaching
salesCycle.trial: Yes — free ebook and blog content serve as the top-of-funnel trial/sample
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Self-serve signup on Teachable for free resources; direct email inquiry (brittany@leveluplady.co) for coaching
salesCycle.topObjection: Price sensitivity — the brand explicitly addresses affordability ('without paying a fortune'), suggesting cost is the primary barrier

ahaMoment: Completing the free 30-day eBook/workbook and experiencing a mindset shift — or reading a blog article that reframes a personal struggle. First value is purely content-led.

retention.recurring: Not confirmed; no membership or subscription tier visible. Repeat engagement through blog readership and future course releases.
retention.expansion: Unknown; potential upgrade path from free blog/ebook → paid courses → 1:1 coaching, but no visible paid tier currently.
retention.churnRisk: High passive churn — free content consumers have no financial commitment and can disengage silently. No re-engagement mechanism visible.

lifecycleGaps: No visible welcome/onboarding email sequence for new Teachable signups
No lead-magnet nurture sequence to convert free ebook downloaders
No trial/consult conversion flow (no discovery call CTA visible)
No booking/reminder flow (no booking system found)
No regular value newsletter (blog exists but no email distribution confirmed)
No renewal or expansion flow (no paid recurring product visible)
toneVoice: Warm, sisterly, and conversational ('Hey Lady!'). Encouraging and empathetic — Brittany speaks from personal struggle. Accessible and non-judgmental. Motivational without being pushy. Budget-conscious positioning keeps tone humble and inclusive rather than aspirational/premium.
compliance: No specific compliance constraints identified. General CAN-SPAM and GDPR apply. No healthcare, finance, or legal content noted.
